title: Ferry Ticket

table.disabled: This route is not available, please choose another route

instant.label: Instant
instant.description: The ticket is issued immediately after payment.

fast.label: Fast
fast.description: The ticket is issued within a processing time of less than 2 business hours after payment.

standard.label: Standard
standard.description: The ticket is issued within a processing time of less than 4 business hours after payment.

slow.label: Slow
slow.description: The ticket is issued within a processing time of less than 1 business day after payment.
